scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && poetry run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && poetry run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:makemigrations: cd apps/api && poetry run alembic revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.db:downgrade: cd apps/api && poetry run alembic downgrade -1
scripts.test: concurrently "cd apps/api && poetry run pytest" "cd apps/web && pnpm test"
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd apps/api && poetry run ruff check ." "cd apps/web && pnpm lint"
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && poetry run ruff check .
scripts.format: concurrently "cd apps/api && poetry run black ." "cd apps/web && pnpm format"
